tests.scenario: Language Selection During Onboarding
steps: Open the app for the first time
Locate the language selection on boarding screen
Select a non-English language (e.g., French)
Continue through the app
tests.expected_result: All UI elements and prompts displayed after language selection are shown in the selected language (French).

tests.scenario: Onboarding Skips Language Selection Screen
steps: Open the app for the first time
Proceed through the onboarding screens
Observe whether a language selection screen appears
tests.expected_result: Before the user reaches the home screen during onboarding, a language selection panel with at least one non-English language option must show up.

tests.scenario: Language Preference remains Across Sessions
steps: Complete onboarding and select a non-English language
Navigate through the app and verify content appears in the selected language
Close the application completely
Reopen the application
tests.expected_result: The app launches in the selected language without prompting the user to re-select a language.

tests.scenario: Recommended Articles Displayed in Selected Language
steps: Select a non-English language
Navigate to the content section
tests.expected_result: All recommended articles are displayed in the selected language.

tests.scenario: Pricing Summary Visible Before Account Creation
steps: Open the app for the first time
Navigate toward the account creation screen
Observe the pricing summary table.
tests.expected_result: A pricing summary is displayed before the account creation form, listing at least 3 free features and the cost of the premium subscription.

tests.scenario: No Pricing Information Shown Before Account Creation
steps: Open the app for the first time
Proceed directly to the account creation screen
Check whether any pricing or feature breakdown is shown before submitting account details
tests.expected_result: The system must display the pricing breakdown before the user is able to submit any account information. If no pricing is shown, the test fails.

tests.scenario: Free Tier User Completes Mood Entry
steps: Create a free-tier account or use guest mode
Navigate to the mood logging section
Select an emotion and complete the mood entry
Submit the entry
tests.expected_result: The mood entry is saved successfully. No paywall prompt appears during the mood logging process.

tests.scenario: Free Tier User Accesses Guided Reflection Exercise
steps: Log in with a free-tier account
Navigate to the guided reflection or exercises section
Attempt to open and complete one guided reflection exercise
tests.expected_result: At least one guided reflection exercise is fully accessible and completable without a paywall.

tests.scenario: Notification Delivered Within Five Minutes of Scheduled Time
steps: Open notification settings
Set a mood check-in reminder for a specific time
Wait for the scheduled time to pass
Observe the device for a notification
tests.expected_result: A notification is received no later than five minutes of the configured time.

tests.scenario: No Notification Received at Scheduled Time
steps: Set a mood check-in reminder for a specific time
Ensure the device has notifications enabled for the app
Wait at least ten minutes past the scheduled time
Check whether a notification was received
tests.expected_result: If no notification is received within five minutes of the scheduled time, the test fails.

tests.scenario: User Reschedules Reminder Without Leaving the App
steps: Open the app and navigate to the notification settings screen
Change the existing reminder time to a new time
Save the new setting
Wait for the original time to pass and observe whether a notification fires
Wait for the new time and observe whether a notification fires
tests.expected_result: If notification is pushed at the original time, the test fails. A notification must be received at the new scheduled time within five minutes of that time.

tests.scenario: User Disables Mood Check-In Reminder
steps: Open the notification settings screen within the app
Toggle the mood check-in reminder to disabled
Save the setting
Wait for the previously scheduled reminder time to pass
tests.expected_result: No push notification is received at the previously scheduled time, then test passes.

tests.scenario: Guest Mode User Creates a Journal Entry
steps: Open the app and select the guest option
Navigate to the journaling section
Write and save a journal entry
tests.expected_result: The journal entry is saved successfully. No prompt requesting an email address, name, or account credentials is shown during the process.

tests.scenario: Guest Mode User Logs a Mood
steps: Open the app and select the guest or anonymous mode option
Navigate to the mood logging section
Select an emotion and submit the mood log
tests.expected_result: The mood log is recorded successfully.

tests.scenario: Mood Log has At Least Ten Emotion Options
steps: Log in or open the app in guest mode
Navigate to the mood logging screen
Observe and count the labeled emotion options presented
tests.expected_result: The mood loging feature has at least ten distinct emotion icon options.

tests.scenario: Mood Options Include Both Positive and Negative Emotions
steps: Open the mood logging screen
Review all available emotion labels
Categorize each as positive or negative
tests.expected_result: The emotion list contains at least one clearly positive emotion and at least one clearly negative emotion among the ten or more options.

tests.scenario: Check-In Question Differs on Consecutive Days
steps: Open the app and note the check-in question displayed on day 1
Complete the check-in
Return to the check-in screen on day 2
Note the check-in question displayed
tests.expected_result: The check-in question on day 2 is different from the question shown on day 1.

tests.scenario: Check-In Question Varies Over Seven Consecutive Days
steps: Record the check-in question shown each day for seven consecutive days
Compare each day's question against the previous day's question
tests.expected_result: No two consecutive days share the same check-in question across all seven days. If any consecutive pair repeats, the test fails.

tests.scenario: Free Tier User Views All Past Journal Entries
steps: Log in with a free-tier account that has at least three saved journal entries
Navigate to the journal history screen
Scroll through the list of entries
tests.expected_result: All previously saved journal entries are displayed with their date stamps. Each entry is fully readable. No paywall prompt appears.

tests.scenario: Journal Entries Displayed in Chronological Order
steps: Log in with a free-tier account
Create multiple journal entries on different days
Open the journal history screen
Observe the order in which entries are listed
tests.expected_result: Journal entries are displayed with their associated dates, sorted in chronological or reverse-chronological order. The ordering is consistent and verifiable by date.
